InventoryPage.title: Buy and Sell
InventoryPage.subtitle: Find the perfect vehicle for your lifestyle.
InventoryPage.sellYourCarDesc: We offer the best market valuation. Contact us for a no-obligation quote.

ServicesPage.title: Our Services
ServicesPage.subtitle: Automotive excellence in every detail. From basic maintenance to high-level customization.

shaken.title: Shaken Inspection
shaken.description: We handle the entire Japanese mandatory inspection process (Shaken). Our team ensures your vehicle meets all legal safety and emissions requirements.

maintenance.title: Maintenance & Repairs
maintenance.description: Complete mechanical services to keep your car in perfect condition. We use state-of-the-art equipment for precise diagnostics.

customization.title: Customization & Performance
customization.description: We transform your vehicle according to your vision. Specialists in JDM tuning and performance upgrades.

ServicesPage.ctaDesc: Contact us for a personalized quote.

AboutPage.title: About JDM Garage
AboutPage.subtitle: Our passion for Japanese cars defines every service we deliver.
AboutPage.storyDescription: Founded by enthusiasts of JDM culture, JDM Garage was born with the mission to raise the standards of automotive excellence. What began as a simple passion for track icons turned into a reference of trust for the automotive community.
AboutPage.missionDescription: To provide the best experience in buying, selling, and maintaining vehicles, combining the precision of Japanese engineering with personalized and transparent service.
AboutPage.value1Desc: Every adjustment and every detail reflects our unwavering commitment to perfection.
AboutPage.value2Desc: Honesty is our engine. You will always know exactly the state and services of your vehicle.
AboutPage.value3Desc: More than a business, we live car culture every day, treating every vehicle as if it were our own.

ContactPage.title: Contact
ContactPage.subtitle: We are here to help with any questions about our vehicles or services.
